'''''Foray''-class blockade runners''' were [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] used by the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] (c. [[3964 BBY]]),<ref name="SWKOTOR:DOF">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Days of Fear]]''</ref> the [[Jedi Civil War]],<ref name="SW:KOTOR" /> and afterwards.<ref name="SW:KOTORII">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>

==Characteristics==
[[File:Capitolship1.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Foray''-class blockade runners and ''Hammerhead'' cruisers in formation.]]

Like the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] warships of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] later years, these vessels had long, slender hulls capped at the stern with large thrusters.<ref name="SW:KOTOR" />

The blockade runners were armed with turreted guns positioned on each side of the ship's bow and point-defense guns lining the main superstructure. The command area was located on the ventral side of the ship.<ref name="SW:KOTOR" />

==History==
The ''Foray''-class's original purpose was to safeguard the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy's]] reach by being mass-produced to the point of filling up the trade routes, but the ship gained new mission uses during the Mandalorian Wars. It assisted [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] troops and civilians caught behind enemy lines, and aided besieged Republic worlds by supplying them while under fire. The ships could also be used to secretly land commandos.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

The ''Foray''-class was one of the two main capital ship classes upon which the Republic fleet depended—along with the [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]]—after most of the larger [[Warship/Legends|warships]] were stolen by fallen Jedi, [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] and [[Darth Malak]], shortly after the [[Battle of Malachor V]].<ref name="SW:KOTOR" />

Many ships of this class were also used to defend [[Citadel Station]], in orbit around [[Telos IV]], against a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] attack led by [[Darth Nihilus]] and the [[Ravager (Centurion-class)|''Ravager'']].<ref name="SW:KOTORII" />
